name: hemp-homes-ai-posts
description: LLM-drafted Hemp Homes blog posts (upbeat/eco/educational, non-sequential) with photo selection from the curated media pool. Approval-gated end-to-end: LLM drafts title + body + photo picks, Dennis edits and approves before publish-to-site or email-to-subscribers. Reuses the outreach Claude pattern (@caistech/ai-client). Public blog rendering + email send are sibling pieces.

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Claude API key for drafting posts via @caistech/ai-client. Already used by hemp-homes-outreach.

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Alternative LLM routing. Either this or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be present; ANTHROPIC preferred.

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CANONICAL_URL
env_vars.description: Canonical app URL, used for the public_journey_url in generated copy. Already set.
